response:
Here are comprehensive unit tests for the `camel_to_snake` function using pytest:

```python
import pytest
from your_module import camel_to_snake  # Replace with actual module name


class TestCamelToSnake:
    """Test suite for camel_to_snake function."""
    
    # Happy path tests
    def test_simple_camel_case(self):
        """Test basic camelCase conversion."""
        assert camel_to_snake("camelCase") == "camel_case"
    
    def test_pascal_case(self):
        """Test PascalCase conversion."""
        assert camel_to_snake("PascalCase") == "pascalcase"
    
    def test_multiple_words(self):
        """Test conversion with multiple words."""
        assert camel_to_snake("thisIsALongVariableName") == "this_is_a_long_variable_name"
    
    def test_single_word_lowercase(self):
        """Test single lowercase word (no conversion needed)."""
        assert camel_to_snake("hello") == "hello"
    
    def test_single_word_uppercase(self):
        """Test single uppercase word."""
        assert camel_to_snake("HELLO") == "hello"
    
    def test_mixed_case_with_numbers(self):
        """Test camelCase with numbers."""
        assert camel_to_snake("camelCase123") == "camelcase123"
        assert camel_to_snake("camel123Case") == "camel123case"
        assert camel_to_snake("version2Point0") == "version2point0"
    
    # Edge cases
    def test_empty_string(self):
        """Test empty string input."""
        assert camel_to_snake("") == ""
    
    def test_single_character_lowercase(self):
        """Test single lowercase character."""
        assert camel_to_snake("a") == "a"
    
    def test_single_character_uppercase(self):
        """Test single uppercase character."""
        assert camel_to_snake("A") == "a"
    
    def test_all_uppercase(self):
        """Test string with all uppercase letters."""
        assert camel_to_snake("HTML") == "html"
        assert camel_to_snake("XMLHttpRequest") == "xmlhttprequest"
    
    def test_all_lowercase(self):
        """Test string with all lowercase letters."""
        assert camel_to_snake("alllowercase") == "alllowercase"
    
    def test_consecutive_uppercase_letters(self):
        """Test strings with consecutive uppercase letters."""
        assert camel_to_snake("HTTPSConnection") == "httpsconnection"
        assert camel_to_snake("XMLParser") == "xmlparser"
        assert camel_to_snake("URLPath") == "urlpath"
    
    def test_numbers_only(self):
        """Test string with only numbers."""
        assert camel_to_snake("123") == "123"
        assert camel_to_snake("456789") == "456789"
    
    def test_special_characters(self):
        """Test strings with special characters."""
        assert camel_to_snake("camelCase_with_underscores") == "camelcase_with_underscores"
        assert camel_to_snake("camelCase-with-dashes") == "camelcase-with-dashes"
        assert camel_to_snake("camelCase.with.dots") == "camelcase.with.dots"
        assert camel_to_snake("camelCase@symbol") == "camelcase@symbol"
    
    def test_existing_underscores(self):
        """Test strings that already contain underscores."""
        assert camel_to_snake("already_snake_case") == "already_snake_case"
        assert camel_to_snake("mixedCase_andSnake") == "mixedcase_andsnake"
        assert camel_to_snake("_leadingUnderscore") == "_leadingunderscore"
